subcodes.first_line: O God and my Beloved! Praise be upon Thee for Thy greatness and thanks be unto Thee for Thy generosity. Thou grantest what Thou dost wish
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و محبوبی لک الحمد علی ما اولیت و لک الشکر علی ما اعطیت توتی من تشاء و توید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
